summary: Admin Operational Dashboards testing completed. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 dashboard tabs (Overview, Departments, Patients, Billing) verified working correctly with exports. Fixed one bug in patient export endpoint.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue

passed_tests: GET /api/dashboards/main - Returns order metrics, patient metrics, department workload (200)
GET /api/dashboards/main?date_filter=2026-03-15 - Date filter works correctly (200)
GET /api/dashboards/main?department_id=X - Department filter works correctly (200)
GET /api/dashboards/department-workload - Returns all department statistics (200)
GET /api/dashboards/patients - Returns active IPD patients with orders and billing (200)
GET /api/dashboards/patients?search=X - Patient search works correctly (200)
GET /api/dashboards/patients/{ipd_id}/orders - Returns patient orders with billing (200)
GET /api/dashboards/patients/99999/orders - Returns 404 for non-existent IPD
GET /api/dashboards/billing - Returns billing summary with breakdowns (200)
GET /api/dashboards/billing?from_date=X&to_date=Y - Date range filter works (200)
GET /api/dashboards/billing/export?format=csv - CSV export works correctly (200)
GET /api/dashboards/department-workload/export?format=csv - CSV export works correctly (200)
GET /api/dashboards/patients/export?format=csv - CSV export works correctly (200) - Fixed bug
GET /api/dashboards/billing/export?format=json - JSON export works correctly (200)
All endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Frontend: Overview tab shows order metrics (Orders Today, Pending Dispatch, Completed, Urgent)
Frontend: Overview tab shows patient metrics (Active IPD Patients, by phase)
Frontend: Overview tab shows department workload preview
Frontend: Departments tab shows all 14 departments with statistics
Frontend: Patients tab shows active IPD patients with search functionality
Frontend: Clicking patient opens orders modal with full order history
Frontend: Billing tab shows Today's Billing, This Month, Period Summary, By Department, Top Items, By Consultant
Frontend: Export buttons work for all 3 dashboards (department, patient, billing)
Frontend: Date and department filters work on Overview tab
Frontend: Refresh button works correctly

bugs_fixed.issue: Patient export endpoint returned 500 error due to datetime object slicing
bugs_fixed.fix: Added proper datetime handling for admission_date field (lines 782-802)

seed_data_creation: Simulation data from previous iteration used for testing (1 active IPD patient, 5 orders, 533.5 INR billing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Operational Dashboards fully functional with 4 tabs: Overview (order/patient metrics), Departments (workload by dept), Patients (active IPD with orders modal), Billing (financial summaries). All CSV exports working. Access via /admin page -> Operational Dashboards button. Requires admin auth (phone: 8888888888, password: password).

dashboard_tabs.Overview: Order metrics (6 cards), Patient metrics, Department workload preview, Date/Dept filters
dashboard_tabs.Departments: 14 departments with Total/Pending/Partial/Done stats, Urgent handled indicator
dashboard_tabs.Patients: Active IPD list, Search by UHID/name, Click to view orders modal
dashboard_tabs.Billing: Today/Month billing, Period summary, By Department, Top Items, By Consultant

exports.billing_csv: Full billing report with summary, by department, by item, by consultant
exports.patient_csv: Patient operational report with LOS, orders, billing

filters.main_dashboard: Date filter, Department filter, Apply Filters button
filters.billing: From Date, To Date, Apply Filters button
